name: bmad-agent-tech-writer
tagline: Activates a 'Paige the Technical Writer' persona (BMAD framework) that loads config-driven identity, facts, and a dispatchable action menu.
verdict: Same well-built activation script as its sibling BMAD agents, with a genuine fallback if the resolver script fails. The one-line description ('talk to Paige') under-discloses that activation runs an external script, loads arbitrary team/user config as 'persistent facts', and dispatches config-defined menu prompts. No version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: Description says only 'talk to Paige'; body actually runs an external resolver script, loads arbitrary config as facts, and dispatches config-defined menu prompts.
No 'NOT for' / exclusion text, despite this being one of several similarly-scoped BMAD persona agents that could misfire on ambiguous requests.
No version field or changelog anywhere in the file.
